prestazioni: Full Stage 2+ ECU remap by **DTE Systems** for the **CUPRA-developed EA888 Gen3 2.0 TSI (DKZA)** engine, targeting 340 HP and 480 Nm torque with **98 RON fuel**, utilizing a **custom turbo-back exhaust system by Milltek Sport (3.5" diameter, non-resonated, 304 stainless steel)** and a **high-flow downpipe by Forge Motorsport (de-catted, 76mm internal diameter)** for optimized spool and reduced backpressure. Includes **NGK 97506 Iridium IX spark plugs (gap set to 0.22mm)** and a **Forge Motorsport intercooler upgrade (50% larger core volume, 30% reduced pressure drop)** to maintain intake temps below 45°C under sustained boost.

Suspension overhaul with **Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers (80mm-120mm drop range, 10-position adjustable damping)** paired with **Eibach Pro-Spacer wheel spacers (20mm front, 25mm rear, hub-centric, 5x112 PCD)** to correct scrub radius and improve turn-in response. Front **Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm hollow, 3-position adjustable)** and rear **SuperPro polybushings (90A durometer, full subframe and control arm refresh)** for reduced body roll and enhanced mid-corner stability.

Forced induction upgrade via **Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing, 62mm compressor inducer, 71mm exducer)** with **custom CNC-machined billet compressor wheel** and **TiAL Sport MV-R 44mm external wastegate (set to 1.3 bar peak boost)**. Supporting mods include a **Forge Motorsport silicone charge pipe kit (4-ply reinforced, 3" diameter)** and a **034 Motorsport high-pressure fuel pump (380 LPH, ethanol-compatible)** with **Siemens DEKA 60lb/hr injectors (flow-matched, 100% duty cycle at 340 HP)** for E85 blends.
estetica: Full **CUPRA ST Concept-inspired widebody kit by Prior Design (PD-ATECAFR, carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear diffuser)** with **custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap (XPEL Stealth finish)** and **debadged front grille (replaced with SEAT Sport emblem in gloss black)**. Includes **custom LED DRLs by LUX Automotive (C-shaped, sequential turn signals, 6000K color temp)** and **retrofitted CUPRA Ateca rear LED taillights (smoked lenses, sequential startup animation)**.

Wheel setup featuring **BBS CH-R II 9.5Jx20 ET40 (front) and 10.5Jx20 ET45 (rear) in Gloss Black with red accents**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/30 R20 front, 275/25 R20 rear, semi-slick compound)**. Brake system upgraded to **AP Racing Radi-CAL 6-piston front calipers (380mm two-piece rotors, slotted, zinc-coated)** and **4-piston rear calipers (356mm rotors)** with **Ferodo DS2500 brake pads (track-grade, low dust)** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel brake lines**.

Interior transformation with **Recaro Sportster CS seats (front, Alcantara/leatherette, 6-point Schroth harnesses)** and **custom rear seat delete (replaced with carbon fiber storage panel by Seibon Carbon)**. Steering wheel swapped for a **Sparco Grid Q RT (350mm, suede, red stitching)** with **NRG quick-release hub**, while the dash receives a **Motec C127 digital dash (12.3" TFT, configurable shift lights, boost/vacuum logging)**. Audio system upgraded to a **Focal Utopia Be kit (165mm woofers, 25mm tweeters, 12" subwoofer in custom enclosure)** with **Audison Voce AV 5.1k amplifier**.
